title: agropyron caninum
intro: Agropyron caninum, also known as red fescue, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Agropyron caninum include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Agropyron caninum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and it is also used in some herbal supplements and tinctures.
